span.p:
Submit feature request,
or develop an alternative

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Help to develop the
features you want! :-)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Is there an
existing Docker image
for the functionality?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Does it need hardware
access on the Raspberry Pi?
(USB, serial, I2C)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Does it need access
to data or services on
the vehicle?

Do you want

span.p:
Build & Push Extension
(to the limit
a.k.a. Docker Hub)
